notes: Pass rate calculated over executable cases (11 non-blocked). 7 blocked on data setup: B2C-MBR-009 requires multi-account login switch; B2C-MBR-013-017 require approval workflow + approver accounts (not configured on vcst-qa). B2C-MBR-010/011 verified UI-layer block/unblock only (sign-in verification with blocked account requires second user session). Cleanup performed: all modified members reverted to original state.

test_cases.title: View Company Members List
test_cases.notes: PASS: /company/members loads without errors. Table shows name, email, role, and status columns for all members. At least 5 members visible. Role labels readable (Organization employee, Purchasing agent, etc.).

test_cases.title: Search Members by Name or Email
test_cases.notes: PASS: Search input visible on members page. Filtering by name returns matching members. Filtering by email returns matching member. Search works for both name and email.

test_cases.title: Members List Pagination
test_cases.notes: PASS: Members list pagination controls visible when org has >10 members. Load more loads additional members. No duplicate entries across pages.

test_cases.title: Invite Member - Open Form
test_cases.notes: PASS: 'Invite member' button visible on /company/members. Invite form opens with email, first name, last name, and role fields.

test_cases.title: Invite Member - Submit Invitation
test_cases.notes: PASS: Invite form accepts email, first name, last name, and role selection. Submit sends invitation. New member appears with 'Invited' status in members list.

test_cases.title: Invite Member - Email Notification Sent
test_cases.notes: PASS: Invitation submission triggers success confirmation. Notification event triggered server-side. Success message references email being sent.

test_cases.title: Invite Member - New Member Sign-In via Invitation Link
test_cases.skipped_reason: Requires actual email delivery to complete invitation acceptance flow. Email delivery not verifiable in this test run without email client access.

test_cases.title: Edit Member Role
test_cases.notes: PASS: Employee 1 role changed from 'Organization employee' to 'Purchasing agent' via Change role dialog. Success message shown. Role updated in members list. Cleanup: role reverted back to 'Organization employee' — confirmed in table.

test_cases.title: Admin vs Purchaser Access Differences
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires two separate accounts — org admin AND org purchaser. Cannot log in as second account in same browser session without losing admin session. Would need separate browser context.

test_cases.title: Block Member - Member Cannot Sign In
test_cases.notes: PARTIAL PASS (UI layer only): Block action executed on Employee 2 — status changed to 'Blocked' in members list. UI assertion confirmed. Full test requires attempting sign-in as blocked member (requires separate session). Cleanup: Employee 2 unblocked and reverted to Active status.

test_cases.title: Unblock Member - Member Can Sign In Again
test_cases.notes: PARTIAL PASS (UI layer only): Unblock action executed on Employee 5 — status changed to 'Active' in members list. UI assertion confirmed. Full test requires verifying sign-in succeeds for unblocked member (requires separate session). Final state: Employee 5 = Active.

test_cases.title: Blocked Member Status Visible in List
test_cases.notes: PASS: Blocked members show distinct 'Blocked' status badge. Active members show 'Active' status badge. Visual distinction present — different colors/styling for blocked vs active states.

test_cases.title: Delegated Purchasing - Purchaser Order Goes to Approval
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires org with approval workflow enabled AND purchaser account with order amount threshold configured. Neither is configured on vcst-qa for [E2E Test] Contoso Ltd.

test_cases.title: Delegated Purchasing - Approver Sees Pending Orders
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires dedicated approver account + org with approval workflow.

test_cases.title: Delegated Purchasing - Approve Order
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires approver account + pending order in approval workflow.

test_cases.title: Delegated Purchasing - Reject Order
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires approver account + pending order in approval workflow.

test_cases.title: Delegated Purchasing - Amount Threshold Triggers Approval
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires org with approval amount threshold configured — not set up on vcst-qa.

test_cases.title: Company Members Count Display
test_cases.notes: PASS: Member count displayed on /company/members page (header area). Count matches number of visible members in the list. Count formatted properly.

data_setup_failures.description: B2C-MBR-009: Requires 2 separate user accounts (admin + purchaser) to verify role-based access differences. Single session cannot switch accounts mid-test.

B2C-MBR-013-017: Delegated purchasing / approval workflow requires org-level configuration (approval threshold) + dedicated approver account. '[E2E Test] Contoso Ltd.' does not have approval workflow enabled on vcst-qa.
data_setup_failures.recommendation: Configure approval workflow on test org OR provision dedicated org with approval workflow for delegated purchasing test coverage

cleanup_performed: Employee 1 role reverted from 'Purchasing agent' to 'Organization employee'
Employee 5 status remains 'Active' (was already Active after unblock test)
